productDisplayName: Skechers Men Torino Dark Brown Shoe
description: Get ready to take relaxed style to the next level with the Torino shoes from skechers. These leather sneakers are great for casual outings and look fabulous when teamed with jeans and tees or shorts for a cool laidback look.Upper Leather upper with soft suede and leahter overlays for comfort and protection Stitch detailing for greater style Embossed brand logo on the side of heel Brand name on the tongue Lace-ups for snug Fit Cushioned collar and tongue for greater comfort Textile shoe lining Midsole Cushioned Relaxed Step insole for step-in comfort Shock absorbing midsole for greater cushioing of the feet Outsole Hight traction outsole with TPR lugs Bold lugs positioned on the periphery of the shoes for greater traction Flexible traction outsole for greater flexibility of the feet Shoe careUse a dry brush to dust off the dirtUse a branded leather polish
